race.description: A.g. Coombs Female Drivers Race Mobile Trot
race.comment: RUN FOREST RUN NZ (4) is a newcomer to the Alex Ashwood yard and enjoys a class drop on what he faced first up in Brisbane. Yet to win in four Australian starts but did manage a fourth at Menangle last time in. This looks a winnable assignment. GOLDEN SKIES (3) had enough speed to lead from a couple of spots wider and proved too good at her latest appearance at Ballarat, scoring by 2 metres. Can push forward again from this draw. Major player. QUAKE PROOF (5) hasn't been far away of late and can be competitive in this line-up. Something for the Multiples: ALDEBARAN MARCUS (1)
